seo.title: Automatically Analyse Meeting Transcripts with AI
seo.description: SSW Tiger automatically analyses meeting transcripts once recording finishes, extracting the instructions and action items you need.

title: SSW Tiger - AI-Powered Meeting Transcript Analysis

pageBlocks.heroTitle: From Meetings to Insight in Minutes
pageBlocks.heroDescription: SSW Tiger uses AI to turn your meeting transcripts into actionable insights — automatically, every time.

pageBlocks.body:
## How SSW Tiger Works

### 1. Record Your Meeting

Use Microsoft Teams, Zoom, or any recording tool. Once your meeting finishes, the transcript is ready for Tiger.

### 2. Tiger Analyses the Transcript

Tiger's AI reads through the full transcript, understanding context, identifying who said what, and extracting key decisions and instructions.

### 3. Get Your Insights

Receive a clear summary of action items, decisions made, and follow-ups needed. No more rewatching recordings or scrolling through notes.

questions.question: What meeting platforms does Tiger support?
questions.answer: Tiger's fully automated pipeline currently integrates with Microsoft Teams. If you have a transcript file from another platform, you can also process it manually through the CLI.

questions.question: Can I customise what Tiger extracts?
questions.answer: Yes! You can modify the AI prompt to tailor what Tiger looks for in your transcripts. Check out our documentation on how to modify prompts to suit your needs.

questions.question: Can I use my own transcript files?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Tiger supports uploading your own transcript files for analysis. See our documentation for details on supported formats and how to get started.

pageBlocks.title: Talk to an SSW Tiger Expert
pageBlocks.ctaDescription: Want to see SSW Tiger in action? Book a 30-minute call with an expert and see a demo!
